title: Open Cloze: How Honey Bees Live

tasks.instruction: Przeczytaj ponizszy tekst. Uzupelnij kazda luke (1.1-1.10) jednym slowem, tak aby powstal spojny i poprawny logicznie oraz gramatycznie tekst.
tasks.text: Honey bees are among the few insects 1.1. _________ live together in enormous, well-organised colonies. A single hive may contain tens of thousands of bees, and every one of them has a particular job to 1.2. _________. At the centre of the colony is the queen, the only female 1.3. _________ is able to lay eggs. She can produce more 1.4. _________ a thousand eggs in a single day during the busy summer months. Most of the other bees are workers, and they are 1.5. _________ kept extremely busy. Some clean the hive, others feed the young, and many fly out 1.6. _________ search of flowers. When a worker finds a rich source of nectar, she returns to the hive and performs a special dance 1.7. _________ tells the others exactly where the food can be found. The nectar is then turned 1.8. _________ honey, which the colony stores for the winter. 1.9. _________ the cold weather arrives, the bees huddle together to keep warm. Without their tireless work, many of the plants we depend 1.10. _________ would never be pollinated.
